code:
import io
import string
import list

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or_zero(s, i)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut neg = false
      if b == 45
        neg = true
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut done = false
      while i < n and not done
        let c = byte_or_zero(s, i)
        if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          done = true
        end
      end
      if neg
        val = -val
      end
      result = list.push(result, val)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn get_or_zero(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let targets = parse_ints(line2)
  let t = get_or_zero(targets, 0)
  let n = nums.len()
  mut found = false
  mut fi = 0
  mut fj = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n and not found
    mut j = i + 1
    while j < n and not found
      let a = get_or_zero(nums, i)
      let b = get_or_zero(nums, j)
      if a + b == t
        fi = i
        fj = j
        found = true
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found
    println("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
end
